headline: AWK's Virginia Unit Plans $0.5M Investment for Infrastructure Upgrades
summary: American Water Works' Virginia unit plans a $0.5M upgrade to replace aging pipelines, highlighting steady infrastructure investment amid growing industry-wide needs.

headline: American Water Spotlights Water Stewardship at CERAWeek 2026
summary: American Water (NYSE: AWK), the largest regulated water and wastewater utility company in the U.S., contributes to global conversations on water stewardship, advocacy and resilience during CERAWeek 2026, held March 23-27, 2026, in Houston, Texas.
